metadata.title: 心行者 Mindhikers
metadata.description: MindHikers researches complex questions, creates clear expression, and experiments with productized creative workflows.

about.title: About
about.intro: MindHikers is a one-person studio doing two things:
paragraphs: Content: deep-dive research and storytelling on YouTube and Bilibili for intellectually curious audiences navigating the AI era.
Products: turning creative workflows and research methods into tools. Built for ourselves first, then shared.
notes: In an age where AI writes, draws, and thinks for you, the scarcest human quality is knowing who you are.
Pain is the standard of truth; friction is where growth happens.

product.title: Product
product.description: A product experiment around research, writing, expression, and creator workflows.
product.headline: The Crucible

featured.title: The Crucible
featured.description: A product experiment around research, writing, expression, and creator workflows. Currently open: AI-assisted deep writing workflow, knowledge management templates, and a creator productivity toolkit.

items.title: AI-assisted deep writing workflow
items.description: A reusable process for research, outlining, drafting, revision, and publishing.

items.title: Knowledge management templates
items.description: Durable systems for collecting, reviewing, and extending long-term research threads.

items.title: Creator productivity toolkit
items.description: Lightweight tools for topics, expression, source management, and publishing rhythm.

blog.title: Content flow
blog.description: Three Carbon-Silicon Evolution essays are live, exploring education, embodied experience, and moral growth in the AI age.
blog.headline: Carbon-Silicon Evolution
blog.emptyLabel: The first wave of writing is still being curated.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: We welcome content partnerships, product collaborations, and thoughtful internet projects.

contact.availability: Content partnerships · Product collaborations · Thoughtful internet projects

productDetail.title: Golden Crucible
productDetail.summary: Golden Crucible is the first public product entry under 心行者 Mindhikers, designed to hold early experiments around research, expression, and creator workflows.
bullets: Organize research threads into durable topic assets
Turn expression work into reusable scripts and structures
Gradually shape creator workflows into productized tools
productDetail.stageValue: The branded entry page is live first. More product detail and richer assets will follow.
